brief.title: CARB Testing Outreach — Draft Email
brief.description: Draft email for NorCal Carb Mobile to send to customers and fleet managers about CARB-compliant carburetor testing and inspection services. Intended to be loaded into the Squarespace Email Campaigns portal.

campaign.name: CARB Testing Outreach — Spring 2026
campaign.audience: Existing customers, fleet managers, walk-in leads from NorCal Carb Mobile contact list

recipients.note: Fill in the email addresses below from the Notion contact database before uploading to Squarespace.
recipients.instructions: Export the full contact list from the Notion database and paste emails into the fields above, then import into Squarespace Contacts or paste directly into the Squarespace campaign audience.

content.subjectLine: Is Your Carburetor CARB-Compliant? We Come to You.
content.previewText: Fast, mobile CARB-compliant carburetor testing — we come to your fleet or driveway.
content.bodyHTML:
Hi [First Name],

With California Air Resources Board (CARB) emissions standards tighter than ever, keeping your carburetor in compliance isn't just smart — it's required.

NorCal Carb Mobile brings certified CARB testing directly to you. No tow truck. No waiting. We inspect, test, and get your carb back in spec — on-site, at your fleet yard or driveway.

What's Included in Our CARB Testing Service:

  • ✅ Full carburetor inspection and diagnostics
  • ✅ Emissions performance testing to CARB standards
  • ✅ Rebuild or recalibration if out of spec (quoted on-site)
  • ✅ Documentation for your records
  • ✅ Mobile service — we come to you in the Sacramento / Stockton / Modesto area

Fleet managers: Ask about our bulk fleet testing rates. We can schedule multiple vehicles in a single visit.

Book a CARB Test Now

Questions? Just reply to this email or call us directly — we're happy to talk through your situation before you book.

Thanks,
Bryan
NorCal Carb Mobile
📍 Serving Sacramento, Stockton & Modesto
🌐 norcalcarbmobile.com
content.bodyPlainText:
Hi [First Name],

With California Air Resources Board (CARB) emissions standards tighter than ever, keeping your carburetor in compliance isn't just smart — it's required.

NorCal Carb Mobile brings certified CARB testing directly to you. No tow truck. No waiting. We inspect, test, and get your carb back in spec — on-site, at your fleet yard or driveway.

What's Included in Our CARB Testing Service:
- Full carburetor inspection and diagnostics
- Emissions performance testing to CARB standards
- Rebuild or recalibration if out of spec (quoted on-site)
- Documentation for your records
- Mobile service — we come to you in the Sacramento / Stockton / Modesto area

Fleet managers: Ask about our bulk fleet testing rates. We can schedule multiple vehicles in a single visit.

Book your CARB test: https://norcalcarbmobile.com

Questions? Just reply to this email or call us — we're happy to talk through your situation before you book.

Thanks,
Bryan
NorCal Carb Mobile
Serving Sacramento, Stockton & Modesto
https://norcalcarbmobile.com

steps.detail: Go to your Squarespace dashboard at squarespace.com and sign in.
In the left sidebar, click 'Marketing' → 'Email Campaigns'.
Click '+ New Campaign'. Choose a layout — a simple one-column layout works well for this message.
Subject: 'Is Your Carburetor CARB-Compliant? We Come to You.' — Preview text: 'Fast, mobile CARB-compliant carburetor testing — we come to your fleet or driveway.'
Copy the HTML from 'bodyHTML' above into the email editor, or use the plain text version for a simpler look.
Upload your contact CSV or paste emails from the Notion database into the audience/mailing list field. Fill in the 'contacts' section above first.
Send a test to your own email address to review formatting before the full send.
Choose 'Send Now' or pick a send time. Recommended: Tuesday or Wednesday morning, 8–10 AM for best open rates.
